events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess rebar placement industrial site. Scenario: missing chairs/supports (mat on dirt). Work rough-complete. Treat as roughly 70 percent complete until defects corrected. Need decision fail because non-compliant/dangerous? Missing chairs/supports means mat resting on dirt, improper concrete cover, rebar will not maintain position during pour, non-compliant with ACI 318/117 and placing drawings. Decision must be fail. Risk high? Could affect structural integrity; missing supports can cause inadequate cover, bar displacement, corrosion, load capacity. In industrial heavy maybe high. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete: 70 until corrected; maybe overall 70 but not acceptable. Value not asked, 0. Sound etc default 0/empty. Findings: missing chairs/supports, rebar mat resting on soil, inadequate cover/bar support, non-conformance with placing drawings/ACI. Actions: install proper chairs/supports at required spacing, verify cover and elevations, re-inspect before concrete pour. Rationale. References: ACI 318, ACI 117, placing drawings. Need JSON valid. Ensure no prose outside.
